rationale: The citing study explicitly positions itself within prior firm-level ACSI research on satisfaction and financial-market outcomes, and the cited paper is a core ACSI investor-outcomes study (credit ratings and bond yield spreads). Given this strong construct/data overlap (customer satisfaction, investor valuation, U.S. public firms) and the citing paper’s focus on explaining mixed prior satisfaction–shareholder value results, this citation is plausibly substantive rather than incidental.
